model_card_purpose_lines: Large-scale direction-aware high-accuracy residual surrogate mapping fit-layer, direction, and transport controls to full AR conductance spectra.
This Task 13 contract upgrades the neural stack beyond the Task 12 plain-MLP comparator while preserving the same feature and output spectrum meanings.
model_card_limitations_lines: This Task 13 high-accuracy checkpoint must be generated on the server from the frozen Task 13 large-scale dataset contract.
It remains limited to supported named in-plane modes and narrow named-mode-centered spread only under the frozen forward metadata family.
Final disagreement-trigger fallback thresholds remain pending held-out calibration before the formal Task 13B launch note is accepted.

frozen_forward_metadata_family.formal_baseline_selection_rule: temperature sweep RMFT pairing data, charge-balanced p≈0 branch, temperature_eV <= 1.0e-3, first 8 samples sorted by temperature
